actual_output:
Hi there,

Thanks for checking in! I don't have a specific ticket reference or context from our previous conversation yet—what's the issue you're following up on? Share a bit more (like your ticket ID, email, or a quick description), and I'll pull up the latest status right away and get you sorted.

Best,  
Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identifies that it lacks the necessary context to provide a status update and proactively asks for the information needed to fulfill the request.
